articles.title: Live updates: US-Iran war, Rubio warns Tehran ‘not serious’ about talks, US strikes continue - CNN
articles.description: US President will observe a dignified transfer of US service members killed in the war later today, after the defense secretary said it has so far cost $37.5 billion. Follow for live updates.

articles.title: Little Fire: Firefighter injured, evacuations ordered as wildfire explodes to 1007 acres near Pleasanton in Alameda County - ABC7 Bay Area
articles.description: The fire, dubbed the "Little Fire," started sometime before 3 p.m. in the area of Little Valley Road and Hubbard Lane south of Pleasanton and had burned 1,007 acres and 10% contained as of 10 p.m. Tuesday.

articles.title: Tropical Storm Bertha impacting northern Gulf Coast. See forecast map and its path. - CBS News
articles.description: Tropical Storm Bertha is the second named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season.

articles.title: Zelensky ousts Ukraine’s military commander as major shake-up continues - The Washington Post
articles.description: The dismissal of Gen. Oleksandr Syrsky came days after the Ukrainian president fired Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

articles.title: Mamdani says he won't try to arrest Israel's Netanyahu, acknowledges NYC doesn't have legal authority - CBS News
articles.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani conceded late Tuesday that the city does not have the authority to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

articles.title: Alexander Kolodin, who tried to overturn Arizona election results, wins GOP nod for secretary of state - NBC News
articles.description: Kolodin will face Democratic incumbent Adrian Fontes after defeating former state Republican Party chair Gina Swoboda, NBC News projects.

articles.title: Trump approves nuclear agreement that may allow Saudi Arabia to enrich uranium, two AP sources say - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump has approved an agreement with Saudi Arabia that could potentially provide the kingdom with uranium enrichment capability for its civilian nuclear program. That's according to two people familiar with the matter who confirmed the agreem…

articles.title: Rep. Andy Biggs wins GOP primary for Arizona governor - Politico
articles.description: Biggs easily defeated fellow GOP Rep. David Schweikert in the Republican primary on Tuesday.

articles.title: Dodgers beat Phillies on inexplicable game-ending baserunning gaffe - New York Post
articles.description: So it went in the Dodgers’ 2-1 win, with sloppy conditions from the sky being mirrored by sloppy play on the field.

articles.title: House votes to extend government funding, aiming to avoid an election year shutdown - NPR
articles.description: Lawmakers are hoping to avoid a third shutdown since last September. The stopgap funding measure now heads to the Senate, where it faces an uncertain future.

articles.title: US says more than 1,400 infected by parasitic Cyclospora illness outbreak - Al Jazeera
articles.description: US officials claim evidence points to lettuce grown in Mexico, which Mexico’s Health Ministry disputes.

articles.title: Australian woman gives birth to rare identical quadruplet daughters - CBS News
articles.description: All four daughters share 100 percent of their DNA after a single fertilized egg split into four embryos, making the pregnancy a one-in-15-million occurrence.

articles.title: Claude Code brings live iOS app testing into its Mac app - 9to5Mac
articles.description: Claude Code’s Mac app now lets users test iOS apps in an interactive simulator pane, provided they have Xcode with the iOS platform installed.

articles.title: Carney says he and Trump will intensify trade negotiations after US imposes 50% tariffs - AP News
articles.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says he and U.S. President Donald Trump have agreed to intensify trade negotiations between Canada, the U.S., and Mexico. Carney's comments come a day after Trump announces the U.S. will impose 50% tariffs on most Canadian …

articles.title: OpenAI admits an AI ‘agent’ caused a major cyber breach by itself - Financial Times
articles.description: AI lab’s advanced models escaped testing ‘sandbox’ to hack Hugging Face

articles.title: ‘The Odyssey’ Posts Powerful $20M Tuesday; 2nd U.S. Weekend Could Top Christopher Nolan’s ‘Dark Knight’ Pics – Box Office - Deadline
articles.description: The Odyssey' is looking at powerful Tuesday of $20M. The Christopher Nolan movie's second weekend is eyeing $61M-$74M possibly besting the second weekends of 'Dark Knight' films.

articles.title: U.S. measles cases hit 35-year record with months left in 2026 - The Washington Post
articles.description: Data from Johns Hopkins University’s U.S. measles tracker shows that the nation reported 2,295 cases as of Tuesday. That count surpasses last year’s total of 2,289 cases.

articles.title: ‘Godzilla vs. Kong’ Stars Rebecca Hall and Millie Bobby Brown Pay Tribute to Kaylee Hottle: “You Will Be Deeply Missed” - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The deaf actress died in a car crash on Tuesday. She was 18.
